ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* Gyroscope measurement in X direction (deg/s) */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Gyroscope measurement in Y direction (deg/s) */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Gyroscope measurement in Z direction (deg/s) */,
  "accel_x" REAL /* Accelerometer measurement in X direction (g) */,
  "accel_y" REAL /* Accelerometer measurement in Y direction (g) */,
  "accel_z" REAL /* Accelerometer measurement in Z direction (g) */,
  "magneto_x" REAL /* Magnetometer measurement in X direction (µT) */,
  "magneto_y" REAL /* Magnetometer measurement in Y direction (µT) */,
  "magneto_z" REAL /* Magnetometer measurement in Z direction (µT) */,
  "barometer" REAL /* Barometric pressure (hPa) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or vehicle where the sensor is installed */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Additional environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., real, simulated) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor, missing) */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sensor when the data was collected */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the sensor when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES sensors ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., gyroscope, accelerometer) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or vehicle where the sensor is installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration in days */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value obtained during calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
